{{Infobox construct
| name = Cormac's serpent
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Cormac's serpent]] is a deep green scaled creature with glowing blue eyes and fangs that glow blue from internal lightning.}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
